extraction.one_line_summary: LAPORTE won stage 1 after TEUNISSEN and VAN HOOYDONCK drove tempo on final climb at 8km to go, splitting race and delivering 1-2-3 for Jumbo-Visma with ROGLIČ second.
tactical_patterns: TEUNISSEN driving tempo on final climb at 8km eliminates sprinters, enabling Jumbo-Visma team time trial finish with 22-second advantage.
Quick-Step pacing for JAKOBSEN before final climb reveals team miscalculation; should have positioned for summit rather than flat leadout.
COLBRELLI dropped on final 8km climb signals surprising weakness for rider expected to contest hillier sprint finishes.
SCHACHMANN losing seconds in group three as defending champion indicates vulnerability when tempo lifted unexpectedly on short climbs.

rider_signals.LAPORTE Christophe: positive: First stage win and yellow jersey at Paris-Nice after working to create gap; stage gifting shows strong team standing
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: Positioned perfectly behind teammates on final climb, only 4 seconds from yellow with bonus seconds already banked
rider_signals.VAN HOOYDONCK Nathan: positive: Third place and 6 bonus seconds demonstrates climbing strength beyond typical domestique role
rider_signals.TEUNISSEN Mike: positive: Pacing at 60kph on final climb created decisive split; versatility beyond sprint leadout role
rider_signals.COLBRELLI Sonny: negative: Dropped on final 8km climb unexpectedly; weakness on short climbs eliminates him from hillier sprint stages
rider_signals.JAKOBSEN Fabio: neutral: Quick-Step positioned him well before climb but tactical choice to chase too early wasted energy
rider_signals.SCHACHMANN Maximilian: negative: Defending champion lost 26+ seconds in third group; vulnerability when pace lifts on short climbs worrying signal
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: negative: Dropped with sprinters on 8km climb indicates poor early-season form for GC contention
rider_signals.YATES Adam: negative: Dropped on final climb with GC contenders suggests conditioning not yet at level for stage racing
rider_signals.HOLMES Matthew: positive: Took KOM jersey from breakaway, showing willingness to animate race early
